response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title 'SAVIOR IN THE DARK' and artist 'JAM Project' from on-screen text. Performed by VTubers (Hakui Koyori, Shishiro Botan, Tsunomaki Watame, Usada Pekora). Performed search: 'SAVIOR IN THE DARK JAM Project Japanese and English lyrics'. Found matching lyrics. The song covers the segment 00:00-04:02, followed by an instrumental gaming segment.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'SAVIOR IN THE DARK' by four VTubers, followed by a brief slot game segment.

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'SAVIOR IN THE DARK' on stage. Song title and original artist are shown at the start in the corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Shishiro Botan, Tsunomaki Watame, Usada Pekora
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
行け 疾風のごとく
宿命の剣士よ
闇にまぎれて
何故 戦うのか それは剣に聞け
正義だとか 愛など 俺は追いかけない
闇に生まれ 闇に忍び 闇を切り裂く
遥かな 古から 受け継いだ
魂の叫び
怒りの刃 たたきつけて
時代に輝け
牙狼！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Go, like the gale
O, fated swordsman
Hidden in the darkness
Why do you fight? Ask the sword
Justice or love, I don't chase after
Born in darkness, hiding in darkness, cutting through the darkness
Inherited from the distant past
The scream of the soul
Strike with the blade of rage
Shine in the era
Garo!

scenes.description: A slot machine game segment featuring Usada Pekora.
